objective: Screen exact target projections on the Wave 52 mixed-hook shard and choose the next model-baseline target.
non_negotiables: Projection reports must use only exact rows from the Wave 52 mixed-hook shard.
Full result-signature sparsity must remain visible; compact projections are next targets, not proof of decomposition-aware learning.
Any learned-model wave must report deterministic floors and unseen-label counts for the selected projection.
Signature metadata remains exact-value metadata, not a new ExactValueClass.

tasks.prompt: Add and run an exact-target projection report over the Wave 52 mixed-hook exact shard.
acceptance: The report covers 60 exact rows from the Wave 52 shard.
The report evaluates 9 target projections using the Wave 52 train/dev/test split.
The report records train-majority floors and unseen-label counts per projection.
The report hash is recorded in docs.

tasks.prompt: Identify which exact projections are viable next model targets and which remain label-sparse.
acceptance: Full result_signature_key remains sparse with 60 labels and all dev/test labels unseen.
component_topology_family has 3 labels, zero dev/test unseen labels, and train/dev/test majority floors 0.3542/0.2/0.2857.
net_material_balance has 15 labels, zero dev/test unseen labels, and train/dev/test majority floors 0.1458/0.4/0.1429.
The next learned-baseline wave targets compact exact projections before full result_signature_key classification.

tasks.prompt: Record Wave 53 as the exact-target selection gate for the next learned-baseline wave.
commands: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py
acceptance: Docs state that Wave 53 is a target-selection gate, not model evidence.
Docs route Wave 54 toward deterministic and learned baselines for compact exact projections.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_53_mixed_hook_exact_projection_inventory.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 53 plan is internally consistent.
The exact projection report is well-formed and reproducible.
